overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a foggy forest trail. The character travels from a grassy woodland path past scattered ruins and wooden debris, eventually reaching a misty lakeside with a wooden dock. The atmosphere is moody and atmospheric with dense fog and cool color grading.

events.description: passing broken wooden barricade debris on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt trail through a foggy forest. Tall pine trees line both sides of the path while patches of grass and shrubs fill the understory. A broken wooden barricade appears on the right side of the trail as the character continues forward through the mist.

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the winding forest path, maintaining steady pace through the fog

entered.detail: large moss-covered rock formation beside the path

segments.scene_description: The journey continues through the dense foggy woodland with the dirt path winding between grassy terrain. Large stone outcroppings become visible on the left side of the trail. The atmosphere remains consistently misty with limited visibility through the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest clearing with distant stone ruins

events.description: ancient stone tower becomes visible through the fog in the distance

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking toward the distant ruins, observing the stone structure emerging from the mist

entered.detail: tall ruined stone structure visible through the mist

segments.scene_description: As the path progresses, an ancient stone tower emerges through the fog in the distant center of the frame. The terrain remains forested with scattered pines and grassy clearings. The ruins hint at previous civilization in this otherwise natural wilderness setting.

events.description: forest opens up to reveal misty lake water on the left side
approaching wooden dock structure at the water's edge

agents.ego_description: Geralt descending toward the lakeshore, approaching the wooden dock extending into the water

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence lining the path
calm misty lake surface reflecting the gray sky
small wooden pier with stairs extending into the lake

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up to reveal a misty lake on the left side as the path approaches a wooden dock structure. A rustic wooden fence lines the right side of the trail leading down to the water's edge. The character descends toward the small wooden pier extending into the calm lake waters.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, foggy woodland that gradually shifts from a narrow forest trail to a more rugged, rocky terrain. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path lined with tall pine trees and thick understory shrubs under a heavy mist. As the character continues forward, the camera passes a broken wooden barricade on the right side of the trail. The scene then expands as the path winds further into the woodland, where the grassy terrain begins to integrate with large stone outcroppings appearing on the left. The journey concludes with the camera pushing deeper into the atmospheric fog, maintaining limited visibility through the towering trees.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense forest that gradually opens into a serene, misty lakeside. It begins on a grassy woodland path where an ancient stone tower slowly emerges through the fog in the distance, framed by scattered pines. As the camera progresses past these ruins, the forested terrain begins to clear, revealing a calm lake appearing on the left. The scene then shifts toward the water's edge, following a rustic wooden fence that lines the trail before descending toward a small wooden pier extending into the mist.
